data.title: Will Dogecoin Price Follow Its Long-Term Uptrend and Rally to $1 Soon?
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) price historical trend continues to draw attention. Analysts monitored a repeated motif that might lead to a strong surge to the $1 area. The most recent formations have indicated a structure similar to past bullish cycles. Technical and derivatives data have passed early tests of market positioning toward moving higher
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/14/will-dogecoin-price-follow-its-long-term-uptrend-and-rally-to-1-soon/

data.title: Hong Kong to Release Second Virtual Asset Policy Statement in 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Hong Kong's Acting Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Joseph Chan, announced plans to release a second policy statement on virtual asset development within this year. The upcoming statement will explore ways to integrate Hong Kong's traditional financial strengths with technological cooperation and innovation in virtual assets. The initiative aims to enhance the security and flexibility of the local real economy and encourage both local and international enterprises to explore innovative applications of virtual assets.

data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Holdings by 8 BTC
data.description: According to PANews, El Salvador has increased its Bitcoin holdings by 8 BTC over the past week. The country's total Bitcoin reserves now stand at 6,207.18 BTC, with a total value of approximately $652 million.
